title: BigBear.ai (BBAI) Institutional Ownership 2026
text: BigBear.ai (BBAI) institutional ownership data for 2026. Major institutional investors including Vanguard, BlackRock, and other investment firms hold significant positions in BBAI. Recent activity shows Vanguard increased its stake by 18%, demonstrating continued institutional confidence in the company's long-term potential. Institutional ownership levels affect stock liquidity and sentiment.
